videoSnippet.title: Sound of Silence || Nikolas Theodorou vs Nodirbek Abdusattorov || UzChess Cup 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Theodorou, Nikolas (2634) - Abdusattorov, Nodirbek (2777) 
3rd UzChess Cup 2026 (Chess.com) [08] 2026.06.14
E11 Bogo-Indian defence

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.Nf3 Bb4+ 4.Bd2 Be7 5.Nc3 O-O 6.e4 d5 7.Bd3 dxe4 8.Nxe4 e5 9.Nxe5 Nxe4 10.Bxe4 Qxd4 11.Qe2 Nd7 12.Bc3 Qb6 13.Nxd7 Bxd7 14.O-O Be6 15.Bf5 Bxf5 16.Qxe7 f6 17.Rfe1 Qc6 18.Qb4 Bd3 19.Rac1 a5 20.Qa3 a4 21.Bd4 Bg6 22.Qc5 Qxc5 23.Bxc5 Rfe8 24.Rxe8+ Rxe8 25.Be3 Kf7 26.Kf1 Bd3+ 27.Ke1 Be4 28.Kf1 g5 29.Rd1 Bc6 30.Rd4 h5 31.h4 Kg6 32.Bd2 gxh4 33.a3 Be4 34.Bc3 Bf5 35.Rxh4 c5 36.Rf4 Bd3+ 37.Kg1 Re6 38.Kh2 b6 39.Kg3 Kg5 40.Bd2 Re2 41.Rg4+ Kf5 42.Rf4+ Kg6 43.Bc3 f5 44.Rf3 Bxc4 45.Re3 h4+ 46.Kxh4 Rxf2 47.Rg3+ Kf7 48.Rg7+ Ke6 49.Kg3
